mapper.update: UPDATE words SET wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, status = '要復習', last_reviewed_on = CURRENT_DATE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO words ( term, meaning, field_name, major_name, minor_name, status, wrong_count, last_reviewed_on ) KEY (term) VALUES ( #{term}, #{meaning}, COALESCE(#{fieldName}, '未分類'), COALESCE(#{majorName}, '未分類'), #{minorName}, COALESCE(#{status}, '学習中'), COALESCE(#{wrongCount}, 0), #{lastReviewedOn} )
